name: windows-computer-use
description: Portable Computer Use tools for Codex via MCP, backed by Windows-Use style Windows control.

interface.shortDescription: Control the local Windows desktop from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides local MCP tools for screenshots, smooth mouse movement, mouse actions, keyboard input, scrolling, cursor position, and visible window discovery on Windows. Mouse control is backed by CursorTouch/Windows-Use style behavior.
defaultPrompt: Take a screenshot of my desktop.
Click a point on the screen.
